creator: llevier@argosnet.com
text:
Hi Edwin,

3 updates in a few minutes?? There is no error?

Please note that PR ports/111193 has just been 
submitted.           http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/111193
Please note that PR ports/111197 has just been 
submitted.           http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/111197
Please note that PR ports/111200 has just been 
submitted.           http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/111200



At 18:40 03/04/2007, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
>Maintainer of security/hydra,
>
>Please note that PR ports/111193 has just been submitted.
>
>If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
>you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
>and a committer will take care of it.
>
>The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/111193
>
>--
>Edwin Groothuis
>edwin@FreeBSD.org

Laurent LEVIER
Systems & Networks Senior Security Expert, CISSP CISM
